"use strict"; module.exports = function (it) { const { directoryPath } = it; return ` ESLint couldn't find a configuration file. To set up a configuration file for this project, please run: npm init @eslint/config@latest ESLint looked for configuration files in ${directoryPath} and its ancestors. If it found none, it then looked in your home directory. If you think you already have a configuration file or if you need more help, please stop by the ESLint Discord server: https://eslint.org/chat `.trimStart(); };
